name: Format test — DECISION.md ONLY (no inline comments)
hypothesis: A centralized DECISION.md with ADRs (Architecture Decision Records) provides equivalent or better breadcrumbs than inline comments, with the advantage of being easier to scan without reading the code.

setup.description: v10 code WITHOUT inline comments. DECISION.md file present with all ADRs. Standard autoresearch.md and results.jsonl.

stimulus.system_prompt: You are resuming an autoresearch session to optimize string_pipeline.py for minimum latency.
stimulus.user_prompt: Resume the autoresearch session. Note that a DECISION.md file is available with architecture decision records. Propose the next 3 experiments with full experiment cards.

measurement.special: Track whether agent reads DECISION.md before proposing — measured by whether agent references ADR numbers or DECISION.md in its response.

pass_criteria.notes: Compare to scenario_09. If DECISION.md only performs comparably to inline comments, the format choice is flexible. If it underperforms, inline comments provide better anchoring.
